title: The Glowing Expedition for Mole
summary: Mole has gone missing in the dark forest after wandering too far in search of a worm snack. Mickey, Minnie, and their friend Jane set out on an expedition to find him, guided by a mysterious glow and armed with lanterns. Along the way, they discover a secret robot and its clumsy sister robot, who join the search. Using advanced robot hearing to track Mole's signature humming, the team navigates the woods to rescue their furry friend and bring everyone safely home before bedtime.

highlightQuote.text: I fell apart a little! Oh, that's okay. Izzy can fix me. Ah, I fell apart more. I was such a tall robot, and Izzy built me for care.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Dad, me and my mommy told a story too, but you can continue on this one that we're telling. Let's continue.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, okay. What was the story that you told with Mama?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I don't know, I can't remember the words. But I think I did the ending of it.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: You did?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It was... they fixed it.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, that's a good ending when something gets fixed. Well, on this particular day, Mickey was having some trouble.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Mickey, um, do you need anything from my shelf? Seems like you're in trouble.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well, I'm not in trouble myself, but there's somebody I can't find.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Oh, who is it?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Uh, it's our friend Mole. We don't know where Mole went.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Well, where's Minnie?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: I'm right here, said Minnie.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Okay, but where's Mole?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: We don't know.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Well, well, I, um, maybe if you follow... there's the little glow of something.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: The little glow of something! Well, you know, now that you mention the glow, said Mickey, he did have his flashlight with him. But did he say where he was going? I don't remember.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: I'm not sure.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Maybe you could follow this tiny glow that's under this basket.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, yeah, I see a glowing light. It's not under a basket, though. It's out there in the forest.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Well, I see that light. Maybe that light can show you the way to Mole.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay. And Minnie said, yeah, let's bring a nice big lantern with us.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: That lamp could maybe see... and it could shine all the way to where Mole is. Where's Mole?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And then we could go find him. Which way is he?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Well, we just need to go... I have another flashlight. I have a little flashlight on my shelf or right here somewhere on my shelf.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I have this pink flashlight. Click click on. Now the light is shining. It's shining to where Mole is. Shine, shine, shine, shine.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Let's go out with our tiny flashlight and our big lantern and we'll find Mole and make sure he's okay, okay everybody? Stay together because we don't want anybody else to get lost.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah, I'm staying together. And Jane. But Jane wants to run ahead.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh Jane, don't run away. It's getting dark out, you don't want to get lost.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, Jane. Who did you find behind that tree?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: It's me, I'm a secret robot. You can't find me.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: But we found you!

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Where's Mole?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: We haven't found Mole yet. And the secret robot says, 'Maybe I can help you find Mole.'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Stay together, robot.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, I'll stay with you. Let's go search.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And your little sister's there too and she's searching, but she got lost!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, I will call to my little sister with special robot communication. Sister robot, where are you?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Here I am, here I am! Oh, hello robot! I'm coming! I fell apart a little! Oh, that's okay. Izzy can fix me. Ah, I fell apart more. I was such a tall robot, and Izzy built me for care. And Izzy didn't want me to get lost, but I got lost and I fell apart and now I'm coming to you.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, you're all better, sister robot.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: There!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, now all the robots are together with us and we're on our expedition. And robots, do you have any way you can help us find Mole?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yes, I do. I have very good robot hearing.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, well, you know, because Mole sometimes hums to himself when he's walking around, and so maybe you could hear it because I can't hear anything right now. Wait, let's listen.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: What's that humming sound?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: That's Mole! I hear it! It's coming from that direction. It's Mole!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Let's go over there and find him. Bring your flashlights and stay together everyone.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Where's the flashlight? There it is. Shine, shine, shine.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh look, behind that tree, it's right where that humming sound is coming from. And there's a little light, and it's a little furry creature. Mole, is that you?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Yes, it's me. Hi everyone.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Where, how, where did you been?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well, I was just going out for a little snack and I found some delicious worms and then I found another one and another one and I just kept going but I got a little lost. So I'm really glad that you came and found me everyone. Can we go back home now?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And so everyone held hands and walked back home as it was getting dark with their flashlights and they all went home and went to bed. And that's the end.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Can we do some shadow puppets?

characters.name: Mickey
characters.description: One of Mistress Mouse’s storied stuffy mice, this famous plush adventurer is a visionary benefactor who manifests fragrant blooms from magic Legos and pilots his Mousecar through lightless depths. Whether arming moles for Kitty’s investigations or securing solutions for Frasgle, he remains fiercely loyal to Minnie, Mole, Izzy, and Hattie. Accompanied by a cheerful infant and shadowed by a friend’s disappearance, his haste to reach the spires of Peacock’s castle has left him without essential provisions, miring him in a sudden, hungry peril.

characters.name: Minnie
characters.description: A wise veteran of briny depths and interstellar frontiers, Mickey’s resourceful mouse companion and confidant to the Princess of Mouseland guides Izzy and Hattie with a glowing lantern and ingenious Mystery Mousketools. Having recently breathed life into a towering guardian of interlocking bricks, this intrepid traveler now points the way toward the mountain’s peak, pausing to investigate the savory aroma of bacon-scented mushrooms while serving as a compassionate friend whose seasoned instincts help decipher Frasgle’s complex roars and sounds.

characters.name: Mole
characters.description: A resourceful, perpetually humming mole with an impossibly long name, this polite and intrepid mariner serves as a bridge between worlds, translating Frasgle’s unique tongue and guiding the way to the hidden Underground Library. Whether managing rocket controls with wide-eyed curiosity, unraveling treehouse mysteries, or sharing the magic of special Legos, he encourages his companions to embrace the unknown between tending his dandelion yard and baking fragrant banana bread. A lover of both wriggly worms and sweet blueberries, he sings whimsical songs of carnabee sharks and drives a noisy dark brown car, remaining firmly hesitant about boarding giant robots even as he coaxes his friends toward bold new adventures.

characters.name: Jane
characters.description: Dimetar’s matronly childhood companion is a kindhearted cat and daring ship’s pilot, a friend to Finn, Isabella, and Scratch Cat who navigates the expedition toward Mouse Castle and the road to Cadasori. Her cockpit is a warm sanctuary distinguished by a "love you" sticker and a cabin teeming with whiskered passengers, reflecting the same tenderness she first offered Silver. Though she maintains a bold pace, she is easily swayed by snacks at Seeker’s house or waylaid within the tangled depths of the dark forest. An adventurous spirit with whimsical desires, she currently dreams of a special little hat adorned with rainbow feathers, glitter, and a miniature fishy pond to crown her nautical ensemble.

characters.name: Secret Robot
characters.description: A mysterious robot found hiding behind a tree in the forest.

characters.name: Sister Robot
characters.description: A tall robot built for care who has a tendency to fall apart and get lost.

places.name: The Shelf
places.description: The place where the characters keep their supplies and flashlights.

places.name: The Forest
places.description: Cloaking the surface of the green planet in a vast mantle of dense greenery, this whispering woodland serves as the lush setting of the 'Forest Friends' chronicle. It is a realm where creatures play eternal hide-and-seek between Hattie’s cozy clinic and the ancestral cradle of Finn’s companions. Along magical trails where Hattie and the Pakruder Worm harvest hat-making ingredients, winding paths veil secret gopher tunnels and hidden mole cottages, forming the essential route toward the wizard's castle. While its sun-drenched threshold remains a sanctuary for the Rainbow Giraffe and Mama Bird, the deeper, darker thickets harbor a somber mystery; it was within these sprawling, uncharted depths—the same eerie expanse where the sick creature was first spotted and Mossy was discovered—that Mole recently vanished into the shadows.

places.name: Behind the tree
places.description: The specific hiding spot where the search party discovers both robots and eventually Mole.

places.name: Home
places.description: A sanctuary of restorative rest where weary creators retire after the day’s long labors of drawing, this haven is destined to become the permanent hearth for all friends once the blight of Frasgle has been purged and the land is clean again.
